title: Set 10: The Science Project 🔬
instructions_en: READ THE STORY. CHOOSE A WORD FROM THE BOX. WRITE THE CORRECT WORD NEXT TO NUMBERS 1–5. THERE IS ONE EXAMPLE.
story_segments: Our class is working on a very interesting science
this month using our science textbooks. We are learning about how animals survive in different parts of the

. Yesterday, our teacher took us to a large forest to look for rare insects.

We had to be very quiet, so we
to each other. My friend used his
to look at a tall tree. He found a small, green beetle that was hiding under a leaf. It was a very exciting

for our team!

We also used some special

to measure the temperature of the soil. It was quite difficult to find enough insects, but we wrote down all the information we found. I hope our team wins the prize for the best science presentation next week!

title_question.prompt: Now choose the best name for the story. Write a letter:

explanations_vi: Tìm hiểu về cách động vật sinh tồn trong môi trường (environment).
Phải giữ im lặng nên chúng tôi thì thầm (whispered) với nhau.
Dùng ống nhòm (binoculars) để quan sát một cái cây cao.
Đó là một khám phá/phát hiện (discovery) rất thú vị.
Sử dụng một số dụng cụ (instruments) đo lường đặc biệt.
Tiêu đề B (Khám phá thiên nhiên bằng khoa học) là đúng nhất vì kể về một dự án khoa học thực tế ngoài trời.
